nodes.name: Observation
nodes.description: text: Jon lost his job but used it as an opportunity to start his dream business: a dance studio. | source_dia_id: D11:3
nodes.premise: Observation: Observation - text: Jon lost his job but used it as an opportunity to start his dream business: a dance studio. | source_dia_id: D11:3

nodes.name: Observation
nodes.description: text: Dance has been Jon's stress-buster since childhood. | source_dia_id: D11:5
nodes.premise: Observation: Observation - text: Dance has been Jon's stress-buster since childhood. | source_dia_id: D11:5

nodes.name: Observation
nodes.description: text: Jon sees dancing as where he feels most alive and considers it a must-have in his life. | source_dia_id: D11:7
nodes.premise: Observation: Observation - text: Jon sees dancing as where he feels most alive and considers it a must-have in his life. | source_dia_id: D11:7

nodes.name: Observation
nodes.description: text: Having his own dance studio and teaching others is a dream come true for Jon. | source_dia_id: D11:9
nodes.premise: Observation: Observation - text: Having his own dance studio and teaching others is a dream come true for Jon. | source_dia_id: D11:9

nodes.name: Observation
nodes.description: text: Jon hopes to create a place for people to dance and express themselves, as it's been a dream of his. | source_dia_id: D11:11
